Stub functions for backlight initialization, LED control, and brightness adjustment.

# Purpose
This C source code file provides function declarations related to backlight and LED control. It includes the header file `drivers/backlight.h` and defines five functions: [`backlight_init`](<#backlight_init>), [`led_enable`](<#led_enable>), [`led_disable`](<#led_disable>), [`backlight_set_brightness`](<#backlight_set_brightness>), and [`command_backlight_ctl`](<#command_backlight_ctl>). The [`backlight_init`](<#backlight_init>) function initializes the backlight system, while [`led_enable`](<#led_enable>) and [`led_disable`](<#led_disable>) control the enabling and disabling of LEDs using an `LEDEnabler` parameter. The [`backlight_set_brightness`](<#backlight_set_brightness>) function adjusts the brightness level of the backlight, taking a `uint16_t` value as input. The [`command_backlight_ctl`](<#command_backlight_ctl>) function processes backlight control commands from a string argument. The file contains TODO comments indicating future plans to move LED enable and disable functionality to a more generic implementation.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `drivers/backlight.h`
